name: U.S. Department of the Interior
description: The U.S. Department of the Interior protects and manages the nation's natural resources and cultural heritage, and honors its responsibilities to American Indians, Alaska Natives, and affiliated island communities.

name: Bureau of Land Management
description: The Bureau of Land Management sustains the health, diversity, and productivity of America's public lands for the use and enjoyment of present and future generations.

name: Chesapeake Bay Foundation
description: The Chesapeake Bay Foundation is the largest independent conservation organization dedicated solely to saving the Bay through education, advocacy, litigation, and restoration.

name: Bayview Community College
description: Bayview Community College serves the Annapolis region with associate degrees, continuing education, and community lectures, including guest programs on environmental and public policy.

name: Annapolis Public Library
description: The Annapolis Public Library offers free access to books, learning programs, GED tutoring, and community author talks for readers across Anne Arundel County.

name: The Capital Gazette
description: The Capital Gazette is Annapolis and Anne Arundel County's daily newspaper, covering local news, government, and community voices, including reader letters and op-eds.
